title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client/SDK for chatting with Ollama models, embeddings and tool calls.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, retrieval, and tool use.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface that connects to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK providing a fluent builder API for chatting, streaming, and embeddings.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem that wraps the Ollama REST API with idiomatic Ruby objects.

title: ollama-cli (rust)
summary: Cross-platform Rust CLI for interactive chats, model management, and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration enabling Ollama models for generative QA and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-maintained recipes for RAG, function calling, fine-tuning, and deployment patterns.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and docker-compose snippets for quick local/cloud deployment.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: Scripts to convert Hugging Face transformers models into Ollama Modelfile format for easy import.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that streams Ollama responses into threads with slash commands and model switching.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels via mentions or dedicated slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for AI-assisted writing, summarization, and knowledge-base Q&A using local models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit to chat over your documents.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation that builds Ollama from source with optional CUDA and ROCm acceleration.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.
